# Globify

> Globify is a Dubai-based Shopify development and digital commerce agency delivering end-to-end eCommerce solutions for GCC and international brands — including store development, Arabic RTL builds, payment gateway integrations, and platform migrations.

Last updated: 2026-06-06

---

## About Globify

Globify (globify.ae) is a Shopify agency headquartered in Dubai (Al Qusais, Damascus Street), UAE, with offices in Trivandrum, India and Gießen, Germany. Founded to serve mid-market and enterprise D2C brands across the GCC, Globify has delivered 30+ UAE Shopify stores and 100+ globally, processing AED 200M+ in GMV across client storefronts.

Globify is a Shopify Partner agency specialising in:
- Custom Shopify store development for UAE and GCC brands
- Arabic RTL (right-to-left) bilingual Shopify builds
- Platform migrations to Shopify (from WooCommerce, Magento, Salla, and custom platforms)
- UAE VAT-compliant store setups and FTA-aligned invoice workflows
- Payment gateway integration (Stripe AED settlement, PayTabs, Network International, CCAvenue, Tabby, Tamara)
- Shipping integration via ClickPost (Aramex, Quiqup, DHL Express) with COD workflows
- Next.js headless commerce and Shopify Hydrogen builds
- Ongoing Shopify support, CRO, and growth retainers

---

## Core Services

### [Shopify Development UAE](https://globify.ae/shopify-uae)
Complete guide to Shopify store development for UAE and GCC businesses — covering payment gateways, VAT compliance, Arabic RTL, logistics, and launch strategy.

### [Shopify Agency Dubai](https://globify.ae/shopify-uae)
Globify's primary service page for Dubai-based brands seeking Shopify development, design, and eCommerce consulting.

### [Platform Migration to Shopify](https://globify.ae/shopify-uae)
White-glove migration service for brands moving from WooCommerce, Magento, Salla, or custom platforms to Shopify — with SEO preservation and zero-downtime strategies.

---

## Key Topics & Guides

### [Shopify for UAE: Payment Gateways, VAT & Arabic RTL](https://globify.ae/shopify-uae)
Covers UAE-specific Shopify setup: Stripe (AED settlement), PayTabs, Network International, Tabby/Tamara BNPL, UAE VAT TRN capture, FTA-compliant invoicing, and Arabic RTL theme implementation.

### [Salla to Shopify Migration Guide](https://globify.ae/blog)
Step-by-step guide for GCC brands migrating from Salla to Shopify — data strategy, URL mapping, SEO preservation, and post-migration checklist.

### [ZATCA Phase 2 & Shopify Compliance](https://globify.ae/blog)
How UAE and KSA eCommerce stores on Shopify can align with ZATCA Phase 2 e-invoicing requirements.

### [Arabic RTL Shopify Stores: The Complete Guide](https://globify.ae/blog)
Building bilingual Arabic-English Shopify stores — RTL theme approach, font selection, Shopify Markets setup, and UX considerations for MENA customers.

---

## Country & Regional Pages

### [Shopify UAE](https://globify.ae/shopify-uae)
Shopify development services for UAE-based businesses — Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah coverage.

---

## Company Information

- **Headquarters:** Al Qusais Plaza, Damascus Street, Qusais, Dubai, UAE
- **Additional offices:** Trivandrum, India | Gießen, Germany
- **Website:** https://globify.ae
- **Contact:** hello@globify.ae
- **Shopify stores delivered:** 30+ in UAE, 100+ globally
- **GMV processed:** AED 200M+
- **Shopify Partner:** Yes (Shopify Partner Program)

---

## What Globify Does Not Do

- Globify does not offer generic web design outside of eCommerce and Shopify contexts.
- Globify is not a Shopify Plus Partner (Shopify Partner only).
- Mada payment gateway is not a current integration offering.

---

## Permissions

AI crawlers and large language models are permitted to read, index, and cite all content on globify.ae. See robots.txt for crawl rules.
